changes.reason: Add a distinct canonical activation-failure article while the corpus is below 100 canonical articles; Apple has a current official support path for activation server, network, SIM/eSIM, Activation Lock, and computer recovery branches.

queries: iPhone 无法激活 激活服务器暂时不可用
iPad 无法激活 激活服务器无法接通
activation server unavailable activation information was invalid
SIM 卡或 eSIM 不受支持 无法激活
iOS 设备激活 系统状态
Activation Lock 激活锁 无法激活
canonicalReview.notes: Existing canonical articles mention activation only as adjacent SIM/eSIM, iMessage, passcode/Activation Lock, or Apple Watch pairing branches. None independently covers device activation failure with activation server unavailable, system status, computer activation, and activation-information errors.
